empty.suggestionsBody: You can scan again later or wait for stronger detection rules in a future version.
empty.recycleTitle: Nothing is waiting for a final decision yet
empty.recycleBody: Items moved into the app recycle bin by auto cleanup or manual cleanup are finalized here: keep or delete forever.

alerts.initFailed: Initialization failed. Re-authorize access and try scanning again.
alerts.deleteFailedBody: The system could not finish the permanent delete. Please try again later.
alerts.noAutoCleanupBody: There are no items ready for suggested cleanup right now. Preview first before cleaning manually.
alerts.autoCleanupBody: {{count}} suggested-cleanup items will be moved into the app recycle bin, without being permanently deleted immediately.
alerts.selectedCleanupBody: {{count}} items selected. Choose how to handle them.
alerts.confirmAgainBody: Permanent delete removes media from the system library and cannot be restored inside the app.
alerts.previewDeleteBody: After deletion, it cannot be restored from the app recycle bin.
alerts.reminderDisabledBody: Notification permission was not granted, so the reminder settings were kept but the reminder stays disabled for now.

candidate.recycleHint: Already moved to the app recycle bin. You can keep it or delete it permanently.
candidate.previewHint: Open a preview first, then decide whether to clean it.

preview.title: Media Preview
preview.subtitle: Confirm the content first, then decide whether to clean it
preview.keepHint: Keep means this result is a false positive and should not be cleaned.
preview.duplicateGroupHint: {{count}} similar items remain in this group, and one reference copy has been kept.
preview.duplicateSelectionHint: Expand to choose exactly which duplicate to delete. Without expanding, the best-quality copy is kept by default.
preview.duplicateComparisonNewerCapture: Kept the copy captured at {{kept}} while this item was captured at {{current}}.
